HYDROARC 74/26.
BARENTS SEA.
WHITE SEA.
RUSSIA.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING
   202100Z THRU 282100Z MAY IN AREAS BOUND BY:
   A. 69-24.00N 039-50.00E, 67-52.00N 044-07.00E,
      66-44.00N 044-24.00E, 68-56.00N 038-32.00E.
   B. 67-31.00N 045-03.00E, 67-15.00N 045-43.00E,
      67-11.00N 045-30.00E.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 282200Z MAY 26.
